scope: Prompt 72 country hubs and PAYE quality pass for Nigeria, Ghana, South Africa, Egypt, Morocco, Malawi, and Zambia.

nigeria.name: Nigeria
nigeria.rationale: hub has enough salary/PAYE depth to operate as a primary salary entry

ghana.name: Ghana
ghana.rationale: hub has enough salary/PAYE depth to operate as a primary salary entry

south-africa.name: Afrika Kusini
south-africa.rationale: hub has enough salary/PAYE depth to operate as a primary salary entry

egypt.name: Misri
egypt.rationale: hub should remain a lighter salary bridge until adjacent country subpages get deeper source-owner review

morocco.name: Moroko
morocco.rationale: hub should remain a lighter salary bridge until adjacent country subpages get deeper source-owner review

malawi.name: Malawi
malawi.rationale: hub should remain a lighter salary bridge until adjacent country subpages get deeper source-owner review

zambia.name: Zambia
zambia.rationale: hub should remain a lighter salary bridge until adjacent country subpages get deeper source-owner review

remainingBridgeDebt.egypt: Keep as bridge until VAT/business and HR country subpages receive source-owner backed copy review.
remainingBridgeDebt.morocco: Keep as bridge until country HR subpages are audited beyond PAYE.
remainingBridgeDebt.malawi: PAYE hub improved, but adjacent HR pages remain static patterned pages per Prompt 71 ledger.
remainingBridgeDebt.zambia: PAYE hub improved, but adjacent HR pages remain static patterned pages per Prompt 71 ledger.
